sports_events_large|circuits|location_me.column_meaning: JSONB column. Encapsulates all geographical and identification data related to the circuit’s location.

fields_meaning.name: TEXT. Name of the circuit. Example: Albert Park Grand Prix Circuit.
fields_meaning.reference_code: TEXT. Circuit reference code. Example: albert_park.

location.city: VARCHAR. City or locality of the circuit. **NULL means the locality was not supplied or is unknown in the source feed.**. Example: Melbourne.
location.country: TEXT. Name of the country where the circuit is located. Example: Australia.

coordinates.latitude: REAL. Latitude coordinate of the circuit. **NULL means the latitude is not recorded or the circuit's exact position is uncertain.**. Example: -37.8497.
coordinates.longitude: REAL. Longitude coordinate of the circuit. **NULL means longitude is missing or unavailable.**. Example: 144.968.
coordinates.elevation_m: INTEGER. Circuit elevation in metres. **NULL means elevation data were not provided for this circuit.**. Example: 10.0.

fields_meaning.external_link: VARCHAR. URL with more information about the circuit. **NULL means no official or stable link is on record.**. Example: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Melbourne_Grand_Prix_Circuit.

sports_events_large|drivers|driver_ident.column_meaning: JSONB column. Consolidates driver’s identity, nationality, and references.

fields_meaning.reference: TEXT. Driver reference code. Example: hamilton.
fields_meaning.racing_number: VARCHAR. Permanent racing number. **NULL means the driver has no permanent number or it is not known.**. Example: 14.0.
fields_meaning.code: VARCHAR. Three-letter identifier code. **NULL means an FIA code has not been assigned.**. Example: HAM.

name.first_name: VARCHAR. Driver's given name. **NULL means the given name is not stored.**. Example: Lewis.
name.surname: VARCHAR. Driver's surname. **NULL means the surname is missing.**. Example: Hamilton.

fields_meaning.birth_date: VARCHAR. Date of birth. **NULL means the birth date is unknown or undisclosed.**. Example: 1985-01-07.
fields_meaning.nationality: VARCHAR. Driver's nationality. **NULL means nationality is not recorded.**. Example: British.
fields_meaning.info_link: VARCHAR. Link to the driver's info page. **NULL means no profile link is available.**. Example: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nick_Heidfeld.

sports_events_large|races|event_schedule.column_meaning: JSONB column. Groups all date and time-related fields for a race weekend schedule including practice, qualifying, and sprint sessions.

fields_meaning.event_name: VARCHAR. Official event name. **NULL means the event name is not yet finalised or entered.**. Example: Australian Grand Prix.
fields_meaning.date_set: TEXT. Date set for the race. Example: 2009/03/29.
fields_meaning.start_time: VARCHAR. Scheduled race start time. **NULL means the start time is TBD or not recorded.**. Example: 06:00:00.

fp1.date: VARCHAR. Free Practice 1 date. **NULL means FP1 is not scheduled or date not published.**. Example: 2022/03/18.

fp2.date: VARCHAR. Free Practice 2 date. **NULL means FP2 is not planned or date is missing.**. Example: 2021/04/16.
fp2.time: VARCHAR. Free Practice 2 time. **NULL means FP2 time is not available.**. Example: 15:00:00.

fp3.date: VARCHAR. Free Practice 3 date. **NULL means FP3 does not occur or date not provided.**. Example: 2021/04/17.
fp3.time: VARCHAR. Free Practice 3 time. **NULL means FP3 time is not recorded.**. Example: 12:00:00.

qualifying.date: VARCHAR. Qualifying date. **NULL means qualifying date is unset.**. Example: 2021/04/17.
qualifying.time: VARCHAR. Qualifying time. **NULL means qualifying time is unknown.**. Example: 06:00:00.

sprint.date: VARCHAR. Sprint-race date. **NULL means no sprint race for this event or date not released.**. Possible values: 2021/07/17, 2021/09/11, 2022/04/23, 2022/07/09, 2022/11/12, 2023/10/07, 2023/11/04, 2024/05/04, 2024/11/02.
sprint.time: VARCHAR. Sprint-race time. **NULL means sprint time is not applicable or missing.**. Possible values: 13:00:00, 13:30:00, 14:30:00, 18:00:00, 18:30:00, 22:00:00.

fields_meaning.details_url: VARCHAR. URL to additional race details. **NULL means no external reference is available.**. Example: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2009_Chinese_Grand_Prix.

sports_events_large|sprint_results|sprin.column_meaning: JSONB column. Captures performance metrics in sprint races including lap data, timing, position, and score.

fields_meaning.final_position: INTEGER. Sprint-race finishing position. **NULL means the driver did not finish / classify.**. Example: 1.
fields_meaning.position_label: VARCHAR. Sprint position label. **NULL means label not provided.**. Example: 1.
fields_meaning.ranking_order: INTEGER. Order mark for the sprint result. Example: 1.
fields_meaning.points: REAL. Points scored in the sprint. **NULL means no points were awarded or result is pending.**. Possible values: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8.
fields_meaning.laps_completed: INTEGER. Number of loops in the sprint. Example: 17.

timing.final_time: VARCHAR. Final total time / status marker for the sprint race. **NULL means the finisher had no classified time or data are not available.**. Example: 25:38.426.
timing.duration_ms: INTEGER. Milliseconds for the sprint. Example: 1538426.

fastest_lap.lap_number: INTEGER. Fastest lap in the sprint. Example: 14.
fastest_lap.lap_time: TEXT. Fast lap time for the sprint. Example: 1:30.013.

sports_events_large|circuit_details|circ.column_meaning: JSONB column. Bundles lap-record info, circuit layout, pit operations, capacity, safety/surface, operational environment, media/hospitality, and certification/heritage for a quick operational/performance view of a circuit.

HeritageCertPack.FIA_GRADE: TEXT. FIA homologation grade of the circuit. Possible values: Grade 1, Grade 2, Grade 3. Example: Grade 1.
HeritageCertPack.FirstGPYear: BIGINT. First year a Grand Prix (or equivalent top series) was held at the circuit. Range: 1950–2025. Example: 2001.

LapRecordPack.LapRecordDriverRef: TEXT. Driver reference (lowercase slug) for the official lap record holder. Possible values (observed): hamilton, schumacher, senna, verstappen. **NULL means no official lap record is available/confirmed (e.g., new circuit or not recorded).** Example: hamilton.
LapRecordPack.LAP_RECORD_TIME: TEXT. Lap record time formatted as M:SS.mmm. **NULL means the circuit has no official lap record time recorded/confirmed.** Example: 1:15.228.
LapRecordPack.lapRecord_msec: BIGINT. Lap record time in milliseconds. **NULL means lap record duration is not recorded/known.** Example: 74572.
LapRecordPack.LapRecordYear: BIGINT. Year when the lap record was set. **NULL means the lap record year is unknown or no record exists yet.** Example: 2023.

LayoutPack.track_length_KM: REAL. Full lap length of the circuit in kilometers. Example: 5.412.
LayoutPack.NumberOfTurns: BIGINT. Count of distinct turns. Example: 20.
LayoutPack.LONGEST_STRAIGHT_M: REAL. Length of the longest straight in meters. Example: 1060.0.
LayoutPack.DRS_ZONES: BIGINT. Count of DRS activation zones. Typical values: 1, 2, 3. Example: 2.

PitOpsPack.PitLaneLength_m: REAL. Pit lane length in meters. Example: 420.0.
PitOpsPack.PIT_LANE_SPEED_KPH: REAL. Pit lane speed limit in kilometers per hour. Typical values: 60.0, 80.0, 100.0. Example: 80.0.
PitOpsPack.GaragesCount: BIGINT. Number of pit garages available. Example: 24.

SurfaceSafetyPack.SurfaceMaterial: TEXT. Primary track surface. Possible values: asphalt, concrete. Example: asphalt.
SurfaceSafetyPack.typicalGripLevel: TEXT. Qualitative grip level. Possible values: low, medium, medium-high, high. Example: medium-high.
SurfaceSafetyPack.medicalCenterGrade: TEXT. Medical facility capability level. Possible values: Level 1 trauma, Level 2 trauma. Example: Level 1 trauma.
SurfaceSafetyPack.MarshalPosts: BIGINT. Number of marshal posts. Example: 40.

OpsEnvPack.timeZone: TEXT. Local time zone indicator (human-readable, not TZ database). Example: UTC+3.
OpsEnvPack.HasNightLighting: BOOLEAN. Whether the circuit has full-night racing lighting installed. Example: true.
OpsEnvPack.LOCAL_NOISE_LIMIT_DB: REAL. Local regulatory noise limit in dB. Example: 105.0.
OpsEnvPack.SustainabilityCert: TEXT. Sustainability certification held by the venue. Possible values (observed): ISO 20121, LEED. **NULL means no certification on record or assessment not completed.** Example: LEED.
OpsEnvPack.Fire_Suppression_Type: TEXT. Primary fire suppression systems. Possible values: foam, foam + water mist, CO2. Example: foam + water mist.
OpsEnvPack.EvacuationRoutes: TEXT. Summary of main evacuation gate directions. Example: N, W gates.

MediaHospPack.TV_Compound_Capacity: BIGINT. Approximate media/TV compound vehicle bay capacity. Example: 40.
MediaHospPack.MediaCenterSeats: BIGINT. Number of media center seats. Example: 400.
MediaHospPack.Hospitality_Suites: BIGINT. Count of hospitality suites. Example: 50.
MediaHospPack.parking_spaces_total: BIGINT. Total on-site parking spaces for spectators and staff. Example: 15000.
MediaHospPack.EmergencyHeliPads: BIGINT. Number of emergency helicopter pads. Example: 1.

sports_events_large|circuit_facilities|v.column_meaning: JSONB column. Groups venue infrastructure, resilience, security, spectator amenities, mobility/logistics, environmental safeguards, and admin notes/meta.

PowerComms.PowerGridCapacity_MW: REAL. Available grid power capacity in megawatts. Example: 12.5.
PowerComms.BackupGenerators: BIGINT. Count of backup generator units. Example: 8.
PowerComms.backupFuelAutonomy_hr: BIGINT. Hours of fuel autonomy for backup power. Example: 24.
PowerComms.FiberBackbones: BIGINT. Number of fiber backbone paths (redundant links). Example: 4.
PowerComms.WiFi_APs_Installed: BIGINT. Installed Wi-Fi access points across the venue. Example: 1200.

SafetySecurity.TURNSTILES_COUNT: BIGINT. Number of entry turnstiles. Example: 120.
SafetySecurity.FireHydrants: BIGINT. Number of fire hydrants across the venue. Example: 90.
SafetySecurity.SecurityStaffCapacity: BIGINT. Maximum security staffing capacity. Example: 1200.
SafetySecurity.VolunteerCapacity: BIGINT. Maximum volunteer staffing capacity. Example: 900.
SafetySecurity.MedicsOnSite: BIGINT. Number of medical staff on site. Example: 80.

SpectatorAmenity.restroomBlocks: BIGINT. Count of restroom blocks. Example: 45.
SpectatorAmenity.Food_Stalls: BIGINT. Count of food & beverage stalls. Example: 200.
SpectatorAmenity.FirstAidPosts: BIGINT. Number of first-aid posts. Example: 12.
SpectatorAmenity.WaterRefillPoints: BIGINT. Public water refill stations. Example: 60.
SpectatorAmenity.BigScreensCount: BIGINT. Number of large spectator video screens. Example: 12.
SpectatorAmenity.PA_Speakers_Zones: BIGINT. Count of PA (public address) speaker zones. Example: 18.
SpectatorAmenity.GrandstandRoofCoverage: REAL. Fraction of grandstand seating covered by roofs (0.0–1.0). Example: 0.35.

MobilityLogistics.ShuttleBusBays: BIGINT. Count of shuttle bus bays. Example: 10.
MobilityLogistics.rideShareDropoffs: BIGINT. Count of designated rideshare drop-off points. Example: 6.
MobilityLogistics.VIP_DROPOFFS: BIGINT. Count of VIP drop-off points. Example: 4.
MobilityLogistics.TeamTruckBays: BIGINT. Number of paddock/team truck loading bays. Example: 20.
MobilityLogistics.Cold_Storage_m2: REAL. Cold storage area (m²) for F&B/logistics. **NULL means not provisioned or not recorded (e.g., very few Food_Stalls).** Example: 259.1.

EnvResilience.SOLAR_KW_PEAK: REAL. Peak installed solar capacity in kW. **NULL means no solar installation recorded or data unavailable (e.g., insufficient roof coverage).** Example: 595.8.
EnvResilience.WindSensors: BIGINT. Count of installed wind sensors. Example: 8.
EnvResilience.Lightning_Rods: BIGINT. Count of lightning protection rods. Example: 14.
EnvResilience.Flood_Barriers_M: REAL. Typical flood barrier height in meters. Example: 1.2.
EnvResilience.WeatherStationPresent: BOOLEAN. Whether a dedicated weather station is installed. Example: true.

OpsNotesMeta.notes_: TEXT. Operational notes or follow-ups (e.g., upgrades, maintenance). **NULL means no notes captured or no outstanding actions.** Example: Install more cameras.
OpsNotesMeta.META: JSONB. Vendor/deployment metadata (e.g., {vendor:…}). **NULL means vendor metadata not recorded.** Example: {vendor: Bosch}.
OpsNotesMeta.created_on: TIMESTAMP. Row creation timestamp. Defaults to now(). Example: 2024-03-01 08:00:00.

sports_events_large|driver_profiles|driv.column_meaning: JSONB column. Collects public-facing/brand, representation, gear, rights/policy, comms reputation, languages/licenses, and audit stamp for a driver.

Representation.ManagerName: TEXT. Name of the driver’s personal manager. **NULL means the driver is self-managed or manager data is not provided.** Example: Manager X.
Representation.AgentCompany: TEXT. Agency or representation company of the driver. **NULL means the driver does not have agency representation.** Example: CAA.

GearPack.HelmetBrand: TEXT. Brand of racing helmet used. Possible values: Bell, Arai, Schuberth. Example: Bell.
GearPack.SUIT_BRAND: TEXT. Brand of racing suit used. Possible values: Alpinestars, OMP, Sparco. Example: Alpinestars.
GearPack.ShoeBrand: TEXT. Brand of racing shoes used. Possible values: Puma, Nike, Adidas. Example: Puma.
GearPack.SimRigBrand: TEXT. Simulator rig brand used for practice. Possible values: Fanatec, Simucube, Logitech. Example: Fanatec.
GearPack.simHours_Week: REAL. Average number of simulation training hours per week. Example: 6.5.

PublicFacing.MerchStoreURL: TEXT. URL of the official driver merchandise store. **NULL means the driver has no merchandise store.** Example: http://store.example.com/2.
PublicFacing.PersonalSiteUrl: TEXT. Driver’s official personal website URL. Example: http://driver2.com.

RightsPolicy.PR_Restrictions: TEXT. Public relations restrictions. Example: No ambush marketing.
RightsPolicy.DataRightsScope: TEXT. Data rights access scope. Example: Telemetry excerpt only.
RightsPolicy.ImageRightsScope: TEXT. Image rights scope. Example: Non-exclusive.

CommsReputation.Public_Speaking: TEXT. Public speaking skill level. Possible values: basic, intermediate, advanced. Example: advanced.
CommsReputation.CharityAffiliation: TEXT. Charity or foundation affiliation. **NULL means no charity affiliation is recorded.** Example: STEM Foundation.
CommsReputation.Notes_: TEXT. Additional notes on preferences or requirements. **NULL means no notes were recorded.** Example: Prefers neutral colors.

LangLicenses.LANGUAGES_JSON: JSONB. Languages spoken by the driver, keyed by ISO codes. Example: {en:true,es:true}.
LangLicenses.licensesJSON: JSONB. Licenses held by the driver. Example: {FIA Super Licence:true}.

sports_events_large|innovation_technolog.column_meaning: JSONB column. Captures performance deltas, materials/suppliers, testing usage, costs, homologation/regulatory, approvals, documentation, ownership signals, timing, and risk notes across a technology’s lifecycle.

PerformanceBlock.ExpectedGain_sec: REAL. Expected performance gain in seconds. **NULL means no expected gain has been calculated.** Example: 0.150.
PerformanceBlock.WeightDeltaKG: REAL. Weight change associated with the technology, in kilograms. Example: -1.2.
PerformanceBlock.Performance_JSON: JSONB. Performance data or expected improvements for the technology. Example: {delta:-0.18}.
PerformanceBlock.CostCapImpact_MUSD: REAL. Impact of the technology on the cost cap in millions of USD. **NULL means the impact is not yet defined.** Example: 0.8.

Materials_Suppliers.MaterialSpec: TEXT. Material specification used for the technology. Example: CF prepreg T800.
Materials_Suppliers.SUPPLIER: TEXT. Supplier of materials or services for the technology. **NULL means no supplier has been assigned or disclosed.** Example: Hexcel.
Materials_Suppliers.PatentRef: TEXT. Reference number for any patent related to the technology. Example: US-123456.

Testing_Usage.WindTunnelHours: REAL. Number of wind tunnel hours dedicated to the technology. Example: 12.0.
Testing_Usage.CFD_Core_Hours: REAL. Number of computational fluid dynamics (CFD) hours for the technology. Example: 50000.0.
Testing_Usage.TestsCompleted: BIGINT. Number of tests completed for the technology. **NULL means no tests have been completed yet.** Example: 35.
Testing_Usage.TESTS_PLANNED: BIGINT. Number of tests planned for the technology. Example: 12.

Homologation_Reg.HomologationNeeded: BOOLEAN. Whether homologation (official approval) is required for the technology. Example: true.
Homologation_Reg.HomologationWindow: TEXT. Window during which homologation is expected to occur. Example: pre-season.
Homologation_Reg.RegulatoryRiskScore: REAL. Risk score for regulatory approval (0.0–1.0). Example: 0.4.
Homologation_Reg.FailureMode_JSON: JSONB. JSON object outlining potential failure modes of the technology. Example: {flutter:high}.
Homologation_Reg.RiskNotes: TEXT. Notes on any risk factors for the technology. Example: vibration near T8.

Compliance_Approvals.ApprovalsJson: JSONB. Approval statuses for the technology. Example: {FIA:pending}.
Compliance_Approvals.DOC_LINK: TEXT. URL linking to official documentation for the technology. Example: http://... .

Timing_Admin.RETIRE_DATE: DATE. Date when the technology is expected to be retired. Example: 2025-07-01.
Timing_Admin.LeadEngineer: TEXT. Name of the lead engineer overseeing the technology. Example: E. Smith.

sports_events_large|race_incidents|incid.column_meaning: JSONB column. Combines flags, stewarding decisions/penalties, impact/cost metrics, medical/pit requirements, contextual conditions, and reference media/telemetry for each incident.

FlagPack.YellowFlag: BOOLEAN. Whether a yellow flag was deployed due to the incident. Example: true.
FlagPack.VSC_Deployed: BOOLEAN. Whether a Virtual Safety Car (VSC) was deployed. Example: false.
FlagPack.SC_DEPLOYED: BOOLEAN. Whether a Safety Car was deployed. Example: true.
FlagPack.RED_FLAG: BOOLEAN. Whether a red flag was deployed. Example: false.

Stewarding.StewardInvestigation: BOOLEAN. Whether the incident was investigated by the stewards. Example: true.
Stewarding.StewardOutcome: TEXT. Outcome of the steward's investigation. Possible values: No further action, Penalty, Warning. Example: No further action.
Stewarding.PenaltyPoints: BIGINT. Penalty points assigned. **NULL means no penalty points were assigned.** Example: 2.
Stewarding.GridPenaltyPlaces: BIGINT. Grid penalty places imposed due to the incident. **NULL means no grid penalty was imposed.** Example: 3.
Stewarding.TimePenalty_sec: REAL. Time penalty in seconds imposed due to the incident. **NULL means no time penalty was assigned.** Example: 5.0.

ImpactCost.Severity_Score: REAL. Severity score of the incident (0.0–1.0). Example: 0.5.
ImpactCost.DebrisField_m: REAL. Length of the debris field in meters. Example: 35.0.
ImpactCost.DeltaRaceTime_ms: BIGINT. Time lost during the incident in milliseconds. Example: 120000.
ImpactCost.CarDamageCost_MUSD: REAL. Cost of car damage in millions of USD. Example: 0.35.

MedicalPitReqs.PitVisitRequired: BOOLEAN. Whether a pit stop is required due to the incident. Example: true.
MedicalPitReqs.MedicalCheckRequired: BOOLEAN. Whether a medical check is required for the driver involved. Example: false.

ContextConditions.Weather_Snapshot: TEXT. Weather snapshot during the incident. Example: light rain.
ContextConditions.TyreCompound: TEXT. Tyre compound used during the incident. Example: C3.
ContextConditions.TyreAge_Laps: BIGINT. Age of the tyre in laps at the time of the incident. Example: 12.
ContextConditions.FuelLoad_KG: REAL. Fuel load in kilograms at the time of the incident. Example: 45.0.
ContextConditions.ERS_State_pct: REAL. ERS (Energy Recovery System) state as a percentage at the time of the incident. Example: 0.65.

Refs.VideoRef: TEXT. Reference to the video footage of the incident. Example: CAM-T8-04.
Refs.TelemetryRef: TEXT. Reference for the telemetry data associated with the incident. Example: INC123.
